title: Dough
description: Adds dough it takes longer to make bread but it makes more bread
body: Adds dough it takes longer to make bread but it makes more bread! i made this mod so if you want to make more food with less materials then here you go! It even adds more stuff than dough like Stale Bread YUCK! and even... STALE BREAD ARMOR?!?!? and even more so play it your self and try it out!
